name: Krampus - Season's Breedings
description:
"No? Shy Guy isn't Obama boss material? Oboss... ma?"

- Alpharad in the Obama Boss Battle video on the Plus/Deluxe/Gold/Platinum channel

Alternatively, from the same video:

"No, honestly, this is nowhere near Ronald's level at all. We, we can touch Obama. We can NOT touch Ronald."

- Jo

Here we are with Christmas bot 2/2. Krampus but big woman.

If this image gets removed, it means janitor wants their site to become LOST MEDIA

Anyways, this is basically just an alt to the original where krampus is big titty woman instead of fat cock man. Scenarios will be basically the same where the first one is she breaks into your house and the second one is where you're kidnapped. Most of it is just a copy and paste with pronouns changed and a few details altered since what do I really need to change?

I'm excited to finally have a console that can play current games again! I've been playing on my PS3 since the summer and while I've had a lot of fun playing MGS2-4 through the HD collection, I miss playing MGSV online. (Not to mention the rest of the literal hundreds of other games I have)
